        };
        reserve: {
            IS_READ_ONLY: false;
            transformReply: (() => SimpleStringReply<"OK">);
            parseCommand(this, parser, key, topK, options?): void;
        };
    };
}

      • parseCommand:function
        • parseCommand(this, parser, key, errorRate, capacity, options?): void

        • Creates an empty Bloom Filter with a given desired error ratio and initial capacity

          Parameters

          • this: void
          • parser: CommandParser

            The command parser

          • key: RedisArgument

            The name of the Bloom filter to create

          • errorRate: number

            The desired probability for false positives (between 0 and 1)

          • capacity: number

            The number of entries intended to be added to the filter

          • Optional options: BfReserveOptions

            Optional parameters to tune the filter

          Returns void

          • Defined in bloom/lib/commands/bloom/RESERVE.ts:21

          };

      • Readonly IS_READ_ONLY: true
      • parseCommand:function
        • parseCommand(this, parser, key, iterator): void

        • Begins an incremental save of a Bloom Filter. This is useful for large filters that can't be saved at once

          Parameters

          • this: void
          • parser: CommandParser

            The command parser

          • key: RedisArgument

            The name of the Bloom filter to save

          • iterator: number

            Iterator value; Start at 0, and use the iterator from the response for the next chunk

          Returns void

          • Defined in bloom/lib/commands/bloom/SCANDUMP.ts:12

        • Checks if multiple items exist in a Bloom Filter in a single call

          Parameters

          • this: void
          • parser: CommandParser

            The command parser

          • key: RedisArgument

            The name of the Bloom filter

          • items: RedisVariadicArgument

            One or more items to check for existence

          Returns void

      • parseCommand:function
        • parseCommand(this, parser, key, errorRate, capacity, options?): void

        • Creates an empty Bloom Filter with a given desired error ratio and initial capacity

          Parameters

          • this: void
          • parser: CommandParser

            The command parser

          • key: RedisArgument

            The name of the Bloom filter to create

          • errorRate: number

            The desired probability for false positives (between 0 and 1)

          • capacity: number

            The number of entries intended to be added to the filter

          • Optional options: BfReserveOptions

            Optional parameters to tune the filter

          Returns void

          • Defined in bloom/lib/commands/bloom/RESERVE.ts:21

          IS_READ_ONLY: true;

              chunk: BlobStringReply<string>;
              iterator: NumberReply<number>;
          };
      }
      • Readonly IS_READ_ONLY: true
      • parseCommand:function
        • parseCommand(this, parser, key, iterator): void

        • Begins an incremental save of a Bloom Filter. This is useful for large filters that can't be saved at once

          Parameters

          • this: void
          • parser: CommandParser

            The command parser

          • key: RedisArgument

            The name of the Bloom filter to save

          • iterator: number

            Iterator value; Start at 0, and use the iterator from the response for the next chunk

          Returns void

          • Defined in bloom/lib/commands/bloom/SCANDUMP.ts:12

        • transformReply(this, reply): {
              chunk: BlobStringReply<string>;

      • Readonly IS_READ_ONLY: true
      • parseCommand:function
        • parseCommand(this, parser, key, iterator): void

        • Begins an incremental save of a Cuckoo Filter. This is useful for large filters that can't be saved at once

          Parameters

          • this: void
          • parser: CommandParser

            The command parser

          • key: RedisArgument

            The name of the Cuckoo filter to save

          • iterator: number

            Iterator value; Start at 0, and use the iterator from the response for the next chunk

          Returns void

          • Defined in bloom/lib/commands/cuckoo/SCANDUMP.ts:12
